artifact_summary: Compliance form for the City of Tampa's Equal Business Opportunity Program detailing SLBE solicitation steps and participation goals.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as a formal Good Faith Effort Compliance Plan (GFECP) submitted to the City of Tampa's Equal Business Opportunity Program. It functions as a mandatory administrative record where contractors must document specific contract particulars and provide a verified checklist of proactive steps taken to solicit Small Local Business Enterprises (SLBEs). The form requires explicit checkboxes to affirm adherence to participation goals and to certify that all necessary supporting documentation has been compiled to demonstrate compliance with local equal business opportunity mandates.
